actions.name: setToastInfoToRunning
actions.description: Displays a toast message 'Das Spiel wurde gestartet'.

actions.name: setStatusLabelToRunning
actions.description: Updates the status label text to 'Spiel wurde gestartet'.

actions.name: SetSpriteMovingToTrue
actions.description: Sets GameState.spritesMoving to true to enable physics.

actions.name: SetCollisionsToTrue
actions.description: Enables collision detection in the GameState.

actions.name: SendRightPaddleUp
actions.description: Moves the right paddle upwards by setting negative Y velocity.

actions.name: resetBall
actions.description: Resets the ball sprite to the center of the court (32, 19).

actions.name: getHitSide
actions.description: Logs debug info when a boundary is hit.

actions.name: Calc Paddle Half
actions.description: Calculates half the height of the paddle for collision math.

actions.name: setGameStatusToPaused
actions.description: Sets the GameState.spritesMoving to false to pause physics.

actions.name: SyncLeftPaddle
actions.description: Syncs LeftPaddle properties (y, velocityY) to network.

actions.name: SyncRightPaddle
actions.description: Syncs RightPaddle properties (y, velocityY) to network.

actions.name: SyncBall
actions.description: Broadcasts current ball position and velocity to connected peers.

actions.name: SyncGameState
actions.description: Syncs global game state flags to network.

tasks.name: InitialAllGameElements

properties.name: InitialAllGameElements
properties.description: Resets the score, ball position, and synchronizes the ball for Player 1.

data.description: Resets the score, ball position, and synchronizes the ball for Player 1.

properties.name: ResetScore
properties.description: Resets the scores of both players to zero.

data.description: Resets the scores of both players to zero.

properties.name: resetBall
properties.description: Resets the ball sprite to the center of the court (32, 19).

data.name: resetBall
data.description: Resets the ball sprite to the center of the court (32, 19).

tasks.description: Resets the score, ball position, and synchronizes the ball for Player 1.

tasks.name: ResetScore

properties.name: ResetScore
properties.description: Resets the scores of both players to zero.

data.description: Resets the scores of both players to zero.

tasks.description: Resets the scores of both players to zero.

tasks.name: StartGame
tasks.description: Orchestrates the game start: initializes elements, serves the ball, sends start message, and enables movement/collisions.

tasks.name: SendLeftPaddleUp
tasks.description: Moves the left paddle upwards by setting negative Y velocity.

tasks.name: SendLeftPaddleDown

properties.name: SendLeftPaddleDown
properties.description: Moves the left paddle downwards by setting positive Y velocity.

data.description: Moves the left paddle downwards by setting positive Y velocity.

tasks.description: Moves the left paddle downwards by setting positive Y velocity.

tasks.name: StopLeftPaddle
tasks.description: Stops the left paddle by setting Y velocity to zero.

tasks.name: SendRightPaddleUp
tasks.description: Moves the right paddle upwards by setting negative Y velocity.

tasks.name: StopRightPaddle

properties.name: StopRightPaddle
properties.description: Stops the right paddle by setting Y velocity to zero.

data.description: Stops the right paddle by setting Y velocity to zero.

tasks.description: Stops the right paddle by setting Y velocity to zero.

tasks.name: SendRightPaddleDown

properties.name: SendRightPaddleDown
properties.description: Moves the right paddle downwards by setting positive Y velocity.

data.description: Moves the right paddle downwards by setting positive Y velocity.

tasks.description: Moves the right paddle downwards by setting positive Y velocity.

tasks.name: ServeBall
tasks.description: Sets the initial velocity for the ball to start the rally.

tasks.name: HandleBallBoundary
tasks.description: Handles collision with walls: bounces off top/bottom, or triggers scoring if hits left/right.

tasks.name: LeftPlayerScores
tasks.description: Increments Player 1 score and resets the ball direction.

tasks.name: RightPlayerScores

properties.name: RightPlayerScores
properties.description: Increments Player 2 score and resets the ball direction.

data.description: Increments Player 2 score and resets the ball direction.

tasks.description: Increments Player 2 score and resets the ball direction.

tasks.name: HandlePaddleHit
tasks.description: Calculates the bounce angle based on relative impact position and reverses horizontal direction.

tasks.name: PauseGame
tasks.description: Pauses the game loop, stopping usage of physics and inputs.

tasks.name: ResumeGame
tasks.description: Resumes the game loop, re-enabling physics and inputs.

tasks.name: PeriodicSync
tasks.description: Periodically synchronizes critical game state (paddles, ball) across the network.

tasks.name: SendStartMessage
